trust_band.desc1: Every batch ships with Mill Test Certificate per EN 10204/3.1.
trust_band.desc2: Dimensions from stock or produced to your specification.
trust_band.desc3: Chemical, mechanical and dimensional checks before dispatch.
trust_band.desc4: Sea, air and express shipment arranged to your door.

authority_cards.title: ISO-Aligned Production
authority_cards.desc: Controlled melting, rolling and finishing processes for consistent properties.

authority_cards.title: Flexible Supply
authority_cards.desc: From prototype quantities to full mill orders, cut to length on request.

authority_cards.title: Application Engineering
authority_cards.desc: Our team helps you select the right grade and temper for your service conditions.

authority_cards.title: Traceable Documentation
authority_cards.desc: Heat numbers, certificates and third-party inspection support available.

applications.heading: Where nickel alloy is used
applications.intro: Nickel alloy materials combine corrosion resistance, high-temperature strength and toughness for demanding environments.

cards.title: Chemical Processing
cards.desc: Resists acids, chlorides and caustic media in reactors, columns and piping.

cards.title: Oil & Gas
cards.desc: Suitable for downhole, subsea and refinery components exposed to sour service.

cards.title: Power Generation
cards.desc: High-temperature grades for turbines, boilers and heat-recovery systems.

cards.title: Aerospace
cards.desc: Creep-resistant superalloys for engine and exhaust applications.

cards.title: Marine Engineering
cards.desc: Seawater-resistant grades for propulsion, desalination and offshore hardware.

cards.title: Pollution Control
cards.desc: Scrubbers, flue-gas systems and waste-treatment equipment grades.

industries.heading: Industries we serve
industries.intro: TrueGrade Metals supplies nickel alloy products to engineers across a wide range of industrial sectors.

resources.heading: Engineering resources
resources.intro: Useful tools and reference materials to help you specify and order nickel alloy products.

cards.title: Weight Calculator
cards.desc: Estimate weight by dimensions and alloy density.

cards.title: Grade Comparison
cards.desc: Cross-reference ASTM, DIN, EN and UNS designations.

cards.title: Pipe Schedule Calculator
cards.desc: Find OD and wall thickness combinations for standard schedules.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.intro: Quick answers about ordering, specifications and delivery from TrueGrade Metals.

items.a: We provide Mill Test Certificate per EN 10204/3.1 as standard, covering chemical composition and mechanical properties. Third-party inspection can be arranged on request.
Yes. We can cut, machine, polish and finish nickel alloy products to your drawing or specification.

items.q: What is your typical delivery time?
items.a: Standard items are usually ready within 2–5 weeks. Custom or large quantities may require additional lead time.
We focus on Monel, Inconel, Incoloy and Hastelloy families, plus nickel, Nimonic, Nitronic and precision alloys on request.
Yes. We ship by sea, air and express to customers across the Americas, Europe, Middle East and Asia-Pacific.

nickel-alloy.html.value_prop: A complete range of nickel alloy pipes, fittings, bars, sheets and wires from a single China-based supplier.
nickel-alloy.html.overview: TrueGrade Metals manufactures and supplies nickel alloy products in five major forms: pipes, fittings, bars, sheets and wires. Our materials cover Monel, Inconel, Incoloy, Hastelloy and other special alloys, with full quality documentation and flexible sizing.
nickel-alloy.html.gallery_intro: Selected images from our nickel alloy product ranges.
nickel-alloy.html.related_intro: Explore the full family of nickel alloy product categories.

nickel-alloy-fittings.html.value_prop: Precision nickel alloy pipe fittings in elbows, flanges, tees, reducers and caps.
nickel-alloy-fittings.html.overview: TrueGrade Metals produces nickel alloy fittings to match our pipes and tubes. Products include elbows, flanges, tees, reducers and pipe caps in Monel, Inconel, Incoloy and Hastelloy grades.
nickel-alloy-fittings.html.gallery_intro: Photos of nickel alloy elbows, flanges, tees, reducers and caps.
nickel-alloy-fittings.html.related_intro: Browse related nickel alloy product categories.

nickel-alloy-bars.html.value_prop: Nickel alloy round, flat, square and hexagon bars with bright or black finish.
nickel-alloy-bars.html.overview: Our nickel alloy bar program includes round bar & rod, flat bar, square bar and hexagon bar in a wide range of sizes and surface finishes. Custom cutting and heat treatment are available.
nickel-alloy-bars.html.gallery_intro: Images of nickel alloy round, flat, square and hexagon bars.
nickel-alloy-bars.html.related_intro: Browse related nickel alloy product categories.

nickel-alloy-sheets.html.value_prop: Nickel alloy sheet, plate, coil and strip for corrosion and heat-resistant applications.
nickel-alloy-sheets.html.overview: TrueGrade Metals supplies nickel alloy sheets, plates, coils and strips in standard and custom dimensions. Materials are available in hot-rolled, cold-rolled and surface-finished conditions.
nickel-alloy-sheets.html.gallery_intro: Images of nickel alloy sheet, plate, coil and strip products.
nickel-alloy-sheets.html.related_intro: Browse related nickel alloy product categories.

nickel-alloy-wires.html.value_prop: Nickel alloy wire, wire rod, filler metal and welding electrode for industrial and fabrication use.
nickel-alloy-wires.html.overview: Our wire range includes nickel alloy wire, wire rod, filler metal and welding electrodes. Products are supplied in coils, spools or cut lengths to meet welding and manufacturing requirements.
nickel-alloy-wires.html.gallery_intro: Images of nickel alloy wire, wire rod, filler metal and welding electrodes.
nickel-alloy-wires.html.related_intro: Browse related nickel alloy product categories.
